findings.evidence: `rg -n "^import TauCeti\." code/TauCeti.lean code/TauCeti -g '*.lean'` reports only `code/TauCeti.lean:6:import TauCeti.Basic` and an unrelated internal import; no root import reaches `BaseChange.lean`.
findings.issue: The new `TauCeti.RingTheory.HopfAlgebra.BaseChange` public API is not imported by the library root, so it is not reachable via `import TauCeti`.

summary: The base-change declarations are now scoped to the intended `HopfAlgebra.BaseChange` API, but the new public module is not exported from the TauCeti root, so downstream users importing `TauCeti` cannot see the API promised for the roadmap target.
